title: Tithymalus paniculatus
taxonomy: Tithymalus paniculatus is classified under the family Euphorbiaceae and the order Malpighiales. It belongs to the genus Tithymalus, which is now considered a synonym for the genus Euphorbia. The classification of Tithymalus paniculatus can also be broken down further into the kingdom Plantae and the domain Eukarya. Furthermore, it is a species of spurge, a type of flowering plant. The species classification of Tithymalus paniculatus is Tithymalus paniculatus.
